positive: A majestic, stylized depiction of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) in a graceful, dynamic pose, surrounded by blooming neon cherry blossoms and ethereal cosmic smoke. The fox should have striking, glowing golden fur and a long, flowing, multi-tailed silhouette. The composition must be highly centralized, featuring the fox as the dominant figure against a deep indigo and midnight blue galaxy backdrop. Use a vaporwave, synthwave, and Japanese ukiyo-e fusion aesthetic, creating sharp outlines and high contrast. Lighting should be dramatic, with neon pink and turquoise accents highlighting the edges of the fox and blossoms. Minimalist background elements should enhance the 'cosmic' feel. Highly intricate, vector-graphic quality, optimized for screen printing and apparel printing, clean lines, vibrant flat colors, smooth gradients.
negative: artifacts, blur, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, low quality, noise, grain, messy, realistic photo, 3d render, messy details
